_comment: US tier-1 macro release calendar. Verify and update quarterly. Sources: BLS https://www.bls.gov/schedule/news_release/ (CPI, NFP), Fed https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm (FOMC), BEA https://www.bea.gov/news/schedule (PCE). Event types must match TYPICAL_MOVES in src/fetchMacroCalendar.ts.
